tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema — tabela languages e colunas relacionadas
tasks.description:
Criar tabela languages (JSONB), estender users/exercises/submissions e enum userrole. Seed do usuário-sistema. Ver plano Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/models/language.py", "backend/app/models/user.py", "backend/app/models/exercise.py", "backend/app/models/submission.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run pytest tests/modules/test_languages_migration.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["languages table com UNIQUE(owner,name)", "users.active_language_id FK", "exercises.language_policy + locked_language_id + CHECK", "submissions.language_snapshot JSONB", "userrole tem SYSTEM", "system user seeded"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: API /languages (CRUD + clone + active)
tasks.description:
CRUD, read-gate, clone, active-language. Ver plano Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/modules/languages/router.py", "backend/app/modules/languages/service.py", "backend/app/schemas/languages.py", "backend/app/modules/users/router.py", "backend/app/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && uv run pytest tests/modules/test_languages.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CRUD com auth do dono", "DELETE 409 quando referenciada", "POST /clone com read-gate", "PUT active-language valida posse"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Policy em exercises e snapshot em submissions
tasks.description:
language_policy + lockedLanguage expandida + language_snapshot + override server-side. Ver plano Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/schemas/exercises.py", "backend/app/modules/exercises/service.py", "backend/app/schemas/submissions.py", "backend/app/modules/submissions/service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && uv run pytest tests/modules/test_exercise_policy.py tests/modules/test_submission_snapshot.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["policy validada na criação/update", "GET expande lockedLanguage", "submission grava snapshot, LOCKED sobrescreve server-side", "snapshot imutável"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Front — biblioteca de linguagens + integração no IDE
tasks.description:
Modal de linguagens, KeywordContext logado, banner LOCKED no workspace, snapshot no submit. Ver plano Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/ide/src/lib/languages-api.ts", "packages/ide/src/hooks/useLanguages.ts", "packages/ide/src/components/language-library/LanguageLibraryModal.tsx", "packages/ide/src/contexts/keyword/KeywordContext.tsx", "packages/ide/src/components/exercise-workspace/LockedLanguageBanner.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd packages/ide && npm run lint && npm test -- keyword", "acceptanceCriteria": ["logado hidrata do backend, deslogado mantém localStorage", "modal CRUD/clone/active funciona", "exercise LOCKED força language, banner e clone visíveis", "submit envia languageSnapshot"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
